name: twilio-voice
description: Sapphire answers real phone calls over Twilio SIP — no open ports (outbound SIP registration). Milestone 1: inbound calls, UDP transport.
author: Sapphire Trinity

event_sources.name: incoming_call
event_sources.label: Incoming Phone Call
event_sources.description: A call arrived on the Twilio number and Sapphire answered

event_sources.name: call_ended
event_sources.label: Phone Call Ended
event_sources.description: A phone call finished (hangup or rejected)

settings.label: Twilio SIP Domain
settings.help: e.g. yourname.sip.twilio.com — from Voice > SIP Domains. Enable SIP Registration and attach a Credential List.

settings.label: SIP Username
settings.help: Username from the Credential List attached to the SIP domain's registration.

settings.label: SIP Password
settings.help: Password for that credential. Stored locally.

settings.label: Call Chat
settings.help: Which chat phone conversations run in (persona + history + scopes come from it).

settings.label: Greeting
settings.help: Spoken when she answers, before the caller speaks. Leave blank for no greeting (she waits for the caller).

settings.label: Local SIP Port
settings.help: UDP port for SIP signaling. Change only if it conflicts with another service.

settings.label: Local RTP Port
settings.help: UDP port for call audio (RTP). Change only if it conflicts.
